name: Branded Sword
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>烙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>印</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つるぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Banish any number of "Branded" Spells/Traps from your GY; Special Summon that many "Iceblade Tokens" (Dragon/DARK/Level 8/ATK 2500/DEF 2000). You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your banished monsters that is "Fallen of Albaz" or mentions it; add that monster to your hand. You can only use 1 "Branded Sword" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Banish any number of "Branded" Spells/Traps from your GY; Special Summon that many "Iceblade Tokens" (Dragon/DARK/Level 8/ATK 2500/DEF 2000). You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your banished monsters that is "Fallen of Albaz" or mentions it; add that monster to your hand. sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

jp_sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
